creator: tech@tern.ru
text:
Makefile was updated but distinfo is not changed yet
Because of this make still fails:
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.imagemagick.org/pub/ImageMagick/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.imagemagick.org/pub/ImageMagick/ImageMagick-6.3.3-5.tar.bz2: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://gd.tuwien.ac.at/pub/graphics/ImageMagick/.
fetch: ftp://gd.tuwien.ac.at/pub/graphics/ImageMagick/ImageMagick-6.3.3-5.tar.bz2: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.carnet.hr/misc/imagemagick/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.carnet.hr/misc/imagemagick/ImageMagick-6.3.3-5.tar.bz2: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)

The recent version is ftp://ftp.imagemagick.org/pub/ImageMagick/ImageMagick-6.3.5-3.tar.bz2
please update the port.
